name: filesystem
description: MCP Filesystem Server — file and directory operations

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the complete contents of a file from the file system.

path.description: Path to the file to read

tools.name: read_multiple_files
tools.description: Read the contents of multiple files simultaneously.

paths.description: List of file paths to read

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Create a new file or completely overwrite an existing file with new content.

path.description: Path where to write the file

content.description: Content to write to the file

tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: Make line-based edits to a text file. Specify old_text and new_text for replacements.

path.description: Path to the file to edit

tools.name: create_directory
tools.description: Create a new directory or ensure a directory exists. Creates parent directories if needed.

path.description: Path of the directory to create

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: Get a detailed listing of all files and directories in a specified path.

path.description: Path of the directory to list

tools.name: directory_tree
tools.description: Get a recursive tree view of files and directories as a JSON structure.

tools.name: move_file
tools.description: Move or rename files and directories.

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Recursively search for files and directories matching a pattern.

tools.name: get_file_info
tools.description: Retrieve detailed metadata about a file or directory (size, permissions, timestamps).

tools.name: list_allowed_directories
tools.description: Returns the list of directories that this server is allowed to access.
